items.title: Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence
items.core_innovation: 2.8T param MoE, Kimi Delta Attention, 1M context, open weights
items.significance: First open 3T-class model, closes gap with closed frontier labs

items.title: Controlling Reasoning Effort in LLMs
items.core_innovation: Mechanisms for training low/medium/high reasoning effort modes
items.significance: Directly cuts inference cost by tuning reasoning depth per task

items.title: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go? Model Size, Search, Learning, and Feedback
items.core_innovation: Fixed-budget analysis of RL post-training allocation choices
items.significance: Practical guidance for teams designing RL post-training pipelines

items.title: Stop Thinking, Start Looking: Efficient Post-Training via Reasoning-Free Alignment
items.core_innovation: Perception-RFT avoids verbose CoT for document QA grounding
items.significance: Cuts inference token cost while matching RL-reasoning accuracy

items.title: Adaptive Filtering of the KV Cache: Diagnosing Structural-Role Bias
items.core_innovation: Fixes H2O-style KV eviction bias toward non-content sink tokens
items.significance: Improves long-context inference on structured data like JSON

items.title: ExTernD: Expanded-Rank Ternary Decomposition PTQ
items.core_innovation: Ternary weight factorization with expanded rank for error correction
items.significance: Pushes ternary quantization accuracy near arbitrary bit levels

items.title: PolyQ: Codesigning End-to-End Quantization for Edge CPU LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Compiler/quantization co-design for per-channel bit allocation on CPUs
items.significance: Enables efficient mixed-precision LLM inference on commodity CPUs

items.title: ExaGEMM: CPU-Driven ML Inference via Associative In-Register Computing
items.core_innovation: Workload-aware framework for low-bit GEMM on conventional CPUs
items.significance: Addresses fragmented low-bit deployment regimes on CPU hardware

items.title: Quantize with Confidence? Empirical Study of Quantization for Code Generation
items.core_innovation: Systematic comparison of 6 PTQ methods on code-gen quality
items.significance: Practical guidance for developers running quantized code models locally

items.title: Never Too Late for Force: Accelerating VLA Post-Training with Reactive Force Injection
items.core_innovation: LIFT adds contact-force reactivity to pretrained VLA policies
items.significance: Improves robot manipulation robustness under occlusion/contact

items.title: Leveraging Instruction Tuning and Merging for Reasoning Model Adaptation
items.core_innovation: Combines SFT and model merging for unverifiable-domain reasoning
items.significance: Extends RL-reasoning gains to domains lacking verifiers

items.title: Gold-Guided Programmatic Distillation for Financial Reasoning
items.core_innovation: Programmatic distillation transfers reliable numerical reasoning
items.significance: Improves compact models' arithmetic reliability over NL rationales

items.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning
items.core_innovation: Zero-RL training scaled to trillion-parameter models
items.significance: Tests emergent reasoning limits of RL-from-scratch at scale
